ddls:
CREATE TABLE "search_engines" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search engine */,
  "engine_name" TEXT /* Name of the search engine (e.g., Google, Bing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the search engine */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the client operates */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the client entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the client entry */,
  "account_manager" TEXT /* Name of the account manager responsible for the client */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the client (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "web_traffic" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic entry */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the traffic data */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine that referred the traffic */,
  "pages_viewed" INTEGER /* Number of pages viewed by users referred from the search engine */,
  "hit_count" INTEGER /* Total hits counted for the time period */,
  "engagement_percent" REAL /* Percentage of engagement calculated from hits and pages viewed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the traffic data */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the traffic data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for each hit */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the user */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_web_traffic_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES search_engines ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_web_traffic_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "total_hits" INTEGER /* Total hits recorded for the report period */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path for the generated report */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the report period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the report period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_reports_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Pages Viewed, Engagement Percent) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_metrics_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES traffic_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for account notifications */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, client) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access log */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client metric */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the metrics belong to */,
  "total_hits" INTEGER /* Total number of hits across all campaigns */,
  "average_engagement" REAL /* Average engagement percentage across all reports */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_metrics_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_data" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic entry */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the geographic data */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country from which the hits originated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the country */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Total hits from the geographic source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the geographic data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the geographic data entry */,
  "city" TEXT /* City from which the hits originated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_data_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_engine_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine */,
  "total_hits" INTEGER /* Total hits received from the search engine */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate calculated from hits */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the performance metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the performance metric */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the performance period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the performance period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_engine_performance_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES search_engines ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client providing the feedback */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was submitted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the feedback */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback (e.g., technical, content, design) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)
